prompt: 현재 웹 앱을 탐색해서 E2E 테스트 플랜을 작성해줘
assertions: Uses planner_setup_page to initialize the browser with the target URL
Explores at least 3 different pages or sections using browser_snapshot and browser_click
Identifies and documents happy path and edge case user flows
Each test scenario includes numbered steps, expected outcomes, and success criteria
Test scenarios are grouped under numbered category headings
Saves the plan using planner_save_plan to specs/ directory
